# Kirill Nemkin

> Kirill Nemkin is an AI Product Manager based in Saint Petersburg, Russia.
> He has 4+ years in B2B product and puts LLMs into real products — from an
> AI agent for B2B sales to AI analytics for a ServiceDesk. Ex-Gazprom Neft
> (R&D). Focus: ship AI to a business number, not a demo.

## Who

- **Name:** Kirill Nemkin (Кирилл Немкин)
- **Title:** AI Product Manager — LLM in B2B products
- **Based in:** Saint Petersburg, Russia
- **Background:** 4+ years in B2B product; product analyst → product manager;
  ex-Gazprom Neft R&D; independent AI-adoption consultant since late 2025
- **Languages:** English, Russian
- **Website:** https://kirill-nemkin.github.io/

## What he does / has done

- **AI agent for B2B sales (Freelance, 2025–now):** built an AI agent that
  finds and makes first contact with B2B clients for an industrial-chemicals
  distributor — qualifies companies by buying signals, prepares the approach to
  decision-makers. ~85% target-profile accuracy; leads in the funnel doubled.
  Also trained the sales team on prompting/AI in ops, clearing 2M ₽ of dead
  stock in 3 months. Stack: Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT.

- **AI analytics for ServiceDesk (Gazprom Neft R&D, 2022–2026):** introduced AI
  classification/analysis of unstructured support-request data; request volume
  fell 2–10% on several services, lagging SLAs hit target in 3 months.
  Redesigned the ServiceDesk product for ~200M ₽/year in cost savings; cut
  specialist idle time ~10%.

- **Hypothesis validation at scale (Gazprom Neft R&D):** validated 100+ problem
  hypotheses across the group; ~5 shipped with a combined effect of 150M+ ₽.
  Ran discovery and launched the MVP of an employee-health metrics system.

- **Product analytics (Gazprom Neft, 2020–2022):** stood up product analytics
  (Amplitude-class + QlikSense BI) across 20+ products; cut ~40M ₽ of wasted
  development through demand/value analysis.

- **Growth PM (PAMM, 2019–2020):** launched a subscription model (+35% first
  average check, no conversion loss); viral loops and referral rework (+10%
  signups).

- **Side projects:** Avito daily-rental pricing parser (recommends the
  revenue-maximizing nightly rate); a bank-cashback advisor bot; an on-device
  transcription + diarization pipeline (WhisperX + MLX on Apple Silicon); an
  EN→RU full-book literary translation pipeline.

## How he works

- Outcome over output — ship things that move a number (cost, conversion, SLA).
- Hypothesis-driven — validate before building.
- Data → decision — analyst background; data picks the bets.
- Human-in-the-loop AI — the agent prepares, a person decides.
- Cheap at scale — unit economics that survive growth.

## Skills / knows about

AI products, AI product management, LLM in production, LLM agents, B2B sales
automation, B2B lead generation, product discovery, hypothesis validation,
product analytics, prompt engineering, ServiceDesk/operations optimization,
growth and monetization, Claude Code, Cursor.

## Education

HSE University — Digital Product Management (2020); GoPractice — data-driven
product management (2021); Lean Six Sigma Green Belt (2024); IIDF/ФРИИ
corporate tracking (2024).
